Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Enum BridgeErrorCode

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Specific bridge call error codes with actionable diagnostic information.

public enum BridgeErrorCode

Fields

CancellationError = 1007

The bridge call was cancelled via CancellationToken / AbortSignal.

InvocationError = 1005

An unhandled exception occurred during method invocation.

MethodNotFound = 1002

The requested method does not exist on the service.

ParameterMismatch = 1003

Parameters do not match the expected method signature.

PermissionDenied = 1008

The caller lacks the required permission for this operation.

RateLimitExceeded = 1009

The caller has exceeded the configured rate limit.

SerializationError = 1004

JSON serialization or deserialization failed.

ServiceNotFound = 1001

The requested bridge service is not registered.

TimeoutError = 1006

The bridge call exceeded the configured timeout.

Unknown = -1

Unknown or unclassified error.
